post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh_token cookie

get.summary: List activity events for an issue

post.summary: Add a comment to an issue
Attach a label to an issue

delete.summary: Detach a label from an issue

get.summary: List unread notifications for the current user
List projects for the current user

get.description: Returns issues with no sprint assigned, sorted by priority (Critical first) then created_at.

get.summary: Get the kanban board for a project

post.summary: Create an issue in a project
Create a label for a project
Add a member to a project

delete.summary: Remove a member from a project

get.description: Returns all sprints for a project ordered by created_at ASC.

post.description: Creates a new sprint in Planning state. Requires admin or owner role.

get.description: Returns a single sprint by ID.

put.description: Updates name, goal, or dates. Blocked for Completed sprints. Requires admin or owner role.

delete.description: Removes a sprint. Only allowed when status is Planning. Requires admin or owner role.

409.description: Sprint is not in Planning state

get.description: Returns story points remaining per day from sprint start to today (or end date). Computed on-the-fly from issue data.

post.description: Transitions an Active sprint to Completed. Unfinished issues move to next_sprint_id or the backlog if omitted. Requires admin or owner role.

parameters.description: Optional: next sprint for unfinished issues
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns all issues assigned to the given sprint.

post.description: Transitions a sprint from Planning to Active. Only one Active sprint is allowed per project. Requires admin or owner role.

409.description: Sprint already active or invalid state

sprint_id.description: SprintID assigns the issue to a sprint. Send 0 to move the issue back to the backlog.
